                            type: str

                      required: false

                        \+[0-9]{4} \+[0-9]{4}|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}.[0-9]+

Formatted stage:
  name: Ensure that the SLS dumpstate can be retrieved
  request:
    method: GET
    url: 'http://localhost:8080/apis/sls/v1/dumpstate'
    verify: !bool 'False'
  response:
    status_code: 200
    verify_response_with:
      extra_kwargs:
        schema:
          mapping:
            Hardware:
              mapping:
                regex;(^[xsd].+$):
                  mapping:
                    Children:
                      matching: all
                      required: false
                      sequence:
                      - pattern: ^[xsd].+
                        type: str
                      type: seq
                    Class:
                      enum:
                      - River
                      - Hill
                      - Mountain
                      required: true
                      type: str
                    ExtraProperties:
                      allowempty: true
                      mapping:
                        Aliases:

                          required: false

                          type: seq

                          type: str
                        IP4addr:
                          required: false

                          required: false
                          type: int
                        Networks:
                          allowempty: true

                                    Gateway:

                                    VLan:

                                      type: int
                                  required: false
                                  type: map
                              required: false
                              type: map
                          required: false
                          type: map

                          type: str
                      required: false

                        \+[0-9]{4} \+[0-9]{4}|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}.[0-9]+

                      required: true
